# Insider submission (Champion)

Use this template if you are submitting an **Insider** entry for the current season.

> Insider attendance details are **not public**. Do not include private attendance info in this PR.

## Required info

- Name / Handle to display:
- Profile link (optional):

## Checklist

- [ ] I added my row under **2026 (Season 1) — Insiders** in `README.md`.
- [ ] If this is the first real entry in the table, I removed the `_No entries yet_` row.
- [ ] I did **not** include private attendance details.
- [ ] My PR only changes what’s necessary for my submission.

## Row (paste the exact row you added)

```md
| @handle | https://example.com (optional) | ![Insider 2026](badges/2026/openhands-insider-2026.svg) |
```
